title: Engineering
scan: What this letter is: The E of CODE — the engineering domain, where business intent is transformed into working software
Why it matters: Unlike the other three CODE letters, Engineering doesn't just carry questions — it carries its own five-layer framework, CODER
Engineering telescopes: zoom into the E of CODE and a second framework unfolds — C · O · D · E · R — five letters for keeping the build itself honest
Deliverables at this level: technical architecture, the CODER plan, and working software
This chapter is the bridge — it opens into CODER, where Code, Optimization & Quality, Deployment, External Integrations, and Release Management each get their own deep-dive
